name: pi-fzf
description_en: A [Pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi) extension for fuzzy finding. Define commands that list candidates from any shell command, then perform actions on the selected item—fill the editor, send to the agent, or run shell commands.
description_zh: 一个用于模糊查找的 [Pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi) 扩展。定义从任何 shell 命令列出候选对象的命令，然后对所选项目执行操作—填充编辑器、发送到代理或运行 shell 命令
